items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA women's woven makeup bag is here! Long-time BV fans will surely recognize this little bag. This time, the double zipper has been changed to a single zipper for a cleaner and simpler use. Small size, big capacity, it can even fit a foundation!

Style: 764044
Size: 16.5*10.5*9

items.name_en: 🧡BV True Love Black and White Panda 15-grid, this is my favorite BV bag this year. Canvas with sheepskin, black and white color scheme is simply beautiful to my heart. Continuing BV's signature weaving elements, minimalist style, no flashy decorations, very versatile and stylish~ Perfect for daily use to carry phone, lipstick, car keys, etc.
items.name_cn:
🧡BV True Love Black and White Panda 15-grid, this is my favorite BV bag this year. Canvas with sheepskin, black and white color scheme is simply beautiful to my heart. Continuing BV's signature weaving elements, minimalist style, no flashy decorations, very versatile and stylish~ Perfect for daily use to carry phone, lipstick, car keys, etc.
Style: 741451
Size: 23*15*5.5cm

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta New Bowling Bag: What can it hold? Have you guys got the new bowling bag? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ Stylishness is not reduced at all, combining BV's classic weaving elements, and it can fit a laptop
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta New Bowling Bag: What can it hold? Have you guys got the new bowling bag? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ Stylishness is not reduced at all, combining BV's classic weaving elements, and it can fit a laptop
Adjustable shoulder strap length
Suitable for tall girls to carry
Boys look sunny when carrying it too ☀️
Style No.: 730327
Dimensions: 28*21*16

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta's new bowling bag: What can it hold? Have you got yours yet? Super large capacity~ Key is low-key and simple, giving off a casual vibe~ The sense of fashion is not reduced at all. Combines BV's classic weaving elements, and a laptop can fit inside. The shoulder strap length is adjustable, suitable for tall girls, and looks sunny on guys ☀️
